overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City at dusk. The character moves along an orange-tiled sidewalk past neon-lit futuristic buildings, passes under a massive elevated highway overpass, and emerges toward a sunset-lit cityscape lined with palm trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city sidewalk with neon advertisements and palm trees

events.description: futuristic vehicle drives past on the right side of the street
slight navigation to the left to avoid oncoming pedestrian

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the orange sidewalk toward the elevated overpass, passing neon-lit buildings and palm trees

notable_agents.action: futuristic sports car driving past on the street

entered.detail: tall cylindrical building with glowing '03' sign and multiple holographic billboards
massive concrete highway structure spanning across the street ahead
row of palm trees lining the left side of the sidewalk
distinctive orange paved pedestrian walkway with geometric patterns
high-rise buildings with glass facades and bright neon signage

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic city street at dusk, with the camera walking along an orange-tiled sidewalk. A tall neon advertisement tower with a glowing '03' dominates the right side, while palm trees line the left. The character approaches a massive elevated highway overpass in the distance as a futuristic vehicle passes by on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway beneath elevated highway overpass

events.description: entering the covered area beneath the massive concrete overpass
moving deeper into shadow as the overpass structure blocks remaining natural light

agents.ego_description: continuing forward under the concrete overpass, navigating through dim artificial lighting toward the light visible at the far end

notable_agents.action: person in light-colored clothing walking ahead under the overpass

entered.detail: massive concrete pillars and ceiling of the highway overpass creating a tunnel-like effect
fluorescent tube lights mounted on the overpass ceiling providing illumination

segments.scene_description: The character enters the shadowy space beneath the elevated highway, where artificial fluorescent lights replace the fading natural light. The concrete structure creates a covered corridor effect, with support pillars lining the left side. The scene is darker and more enclosed, with the exit visible as a bright opening ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open city street with sunset view and distant skyscrapers

events.description: exiting the covered overpass into the open street with view of sunset ahead
emerging from shadow into warm golden hour light from the setting sun

agents.ego_description: walking out from under the overpass toward the setting sun, with the cityscape opening up ahead and palm trees visible in the distance

entered.detail: distant city buildings silhouetted against the orange and pink sunset sky
palm trees visible further down the street against the sunset backdrop

segments.scene_description: Emerging from under the overpass, the scene opens into a wide city street bathed in the warm golden light of sunset. The elevated highway now recedes to the left as the camera walks toward the distant skyline. Palm trees line the left side of the street, and futuristic buildings with glowing signs continue along the right, creating a cyberpunk atmosphere against the natural sunset.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a futuristic city street that transitions from a neon-lit sidewalk into a dark underpass before emerging into a golden sunset. It begins by walking along an orange-tiled path flanked by palm trees and a towering neon advertisement, moving steadily toward a massive elevated highway overpass. As the camera enters the space beneath the highway, the natural dusk light is replaced by the cold glow of artificial fluorescent lamps and the enclosing shadows of concrete support pillars. The scene then opens and expands as the camera exits the covered corridor, shifting abruptly back into the warm, radiant light of a sunset-bathed cityscape. Finally, the view widens to reveal a distant skyline and glowing futuristic buildings, with the highway receding to the left as the path continues forward.
